title: Crispy Thai Slaw Wings
description: Crispy fried chicken wings tossed in a sweet and spicy Thai-inspired slaw made with crunchy slaw and fresh cider.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a blender or food processor, combine cider vinegar, fish sauce, honey, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Add the crunchy slaw to the blender and blend until well combined.
Dredge the chicken wings in flour, shaking off excess.
Fry the chicken wings in batches until golden brown and cooked through.
Toss the fried chicken wings in the slaw mixture until well coated.
